rationale: Educ. Code §44.054 addresses criminal penalties for school officers refusing to transfer students and funds. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A county judge serving as ex officio county superintendent, a county, district, or municipal superintendent, or a school officer who refuses to transfer students and funds as provided by Subchapter B, Chapter 25, commits an offense.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
